headline: What to Expect From Digital Realty Trust's Q1 2026 Earnings Report
summary: Digital Realty Trust is scheduled to report its first-quarter results soon, and analysts expect a single-digit earnings rise.

headline: Digital Realty Trust Builds U.S. Hyperscale Fund To Support AI Expansion
summary: Digital Realty Trust has closed fundraising for its first U.S. hyperscale data center fund, securing over $3 billion from global institutional investors. The company has also appointed two senior executives to its Strategic Private Capital team to support fund management and capital-raising efforts. These moves come as Digital Realty deepens its focus on cloud and AI infrastructure across the U.S. market. Digital Realty Trust (NYSE: DLR) enters this new phase with its shares trading around...
